official_name: Korean Agency for Technology and Standards
notes: South Korean national standards agency. Publishes the Korean Industrial Standards (KS) series. KS X-series covers information technology including information security. Most KS X ISO/IEC standards are Korean adoptions of ISO/IEC originals. License posture: paywalled or restricted access through the KATS standards portal at standard.go.kr.

match_nodes.description: KS X ISO/IEC adoptions — Korean editions of ISO/IEC standards

data.notes: Korean national editions of ISO/IEC standards. Technical content tracks the ISO master; cross-reference secid:control/iso.org/<n>. Subject to ISO redistribution terms.
